case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS VS. CAMROCK COMPANY, INDIVIDUALLY et al

docket_entries.description: FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LABORERS LOCAL UNION NO. 139

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LABORERS LOCAL UNION NO. 139 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CAMROCK COMPANY INC., INDIVIDUALLY CAMROCK CO. INC, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA CAMROCK COMPANY CAMROCK CO INC, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA CAMROCK COMPANY, INC $16,318.13 PRINCIPAL, $1,383.75 ATTORNEY FEES, $718.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,420.68, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO SASE, COPY IN 302 OUTBOX)
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RESPONDENT CAMROCK COMPANY INC., INDIVIDUALLY

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT CAMROCK COMPANY INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PETITIONER'S EVIDENTIARY SHOWING IS MORE PERSUASIVE AND RESPONDENT WAS PROPERLY SERVED. THE COURT DENIES PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kathleen Morgan, Esq. of the L/O of Kathleen Morgan, Tel. 415.994.1342, for respondent and moving party;
Conchita Lozano-Batista, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, for petitioner and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT CAMROCK COMPANY INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. The Court finds that petitioner's evidentiary showing is more persuasive and respondent was properly served. The Court denies petitioner's request for fees. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

First Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel S. Brome, Esq., of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Off Calendar
